ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state name */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  "isLockedDown" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is under lockdown */,
  "lockdown_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lockdown */,
  "lockdown_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lockdown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the cases were reported */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported on the given date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases reported up to the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths reported up to the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases reported on the given date */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of recovered cases reported up to the given date */,
  "test_count" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the given date */,
  "test_positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is archived */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visualization is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the visualization is archived */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the visualization is shared */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the visualization was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_title" TEXT /* Title of the export */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was exported */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the export is public or private */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the export is archived */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the export is shared */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the export was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., spike in cases, data anomaly) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the alert was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., report, visualization, export) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the collaboration was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, data update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the log entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
